title: koeleria pyramidata subsp. arenaria
intro: Koeleria pyramidata subsp. arenaria, also known as sand hair-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal areas in Europe, Asia, and North America. It is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of sand hair-grass include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Koeleria pyramidata subsp. arenaria often involve infusions of the plant's flowers or leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or dried powder for medicinal purposes.
